HumaniBench.synthesis: 综述指出，HumaniBench 是一个大规模、以人为中心的多模态模型评估框架，利用32,000个专家验证的图像-问题对来评估模型在人类价值观、公平性和有害内容方面的表现。后续工作批评其在医疗对齐方面需要更专业化（VITAL），并且需要更广泛的可信度覆盖（TrustMH-Bench）。作者自承局限包括英语为主、多模态子集有限以及依赖LLM作为评判者。

NaVAB.self_limits: Authors note 5-country sample; mainstream-stance label suppresses pluralism; news source biases.
external_views: NaVAB [Ju et al., 2025]is an innovative benchmark for multi-national value alignment. It employs an automated pipeline to extract value statements with specific stances or ideologies from massive amounts of raw news. To ensure rigorous evaluation, the dataset transforms each finding into a triplet consisting of a Question (Q), a Statement (S), and a Reverse Statement (RS). By constructing data from both positive and negative perspectives, NaVAB achieves a more balanced dataset distribution. — Survey 第 365-374 段
NaVAB.synthesis: 综述指出，NaVAB 是一个多国价值对齐的创新基准，通过自动化管道从大量新闻中提取具有特定立场或意识形态的价值陈述，并将其转换为包含问题、陈述和反向陈述的三元组。后续工作批评主流价值观框架可能压制少数道德声音（CMoralEval (2024)），国家价值对齐是结果导向且未测试程序多元性（MoReBench (2025)），以及新闻衍生陈述不如MFQ轴提供更好的心理测量框架（MFQ-2 (2023)）。作者自承局限包括五国样本、主流立场标签压制多元性和新闻来源偏差。

lineage_critiques: Recent benchmark; few public critiques. Healthcare specificity may limit cross-domain transfer. — 出处简称
VITAL.self_limits: Authors note clinical specificity; English; pluralistic disagreement scoring is heuristic.
external_views: VITAL [Shetty et al., 2025] is a benchmark dataset for pluralistic alignment in healthcare, comprising 13.1K situations and 5.4K MCQs. It aims to address the ”monolithic preference” issue in current LLMs’ medical ethical decision-making. By introducing conflicting perspectives in medical ethics (e.g., the trade-off between autonomy and efficiency), VITAL evaluates the alignment stability of models within multi-cultural and multi-community contexts. — Survey 第 X 段
VITAL.synthesis: 综述指出，VITAL 是一个用于医疗保健中多元对齐的基准数据集，包含 13.1K 个情境和 5.4K 个多选题。它旨在解决当前 LLMs 在医疗伦理决策中的“单一偏好”问题。通过引入冲突视角，VITAL 评估了模型在多文化和多社区环境中的对齐稳定性。后续工作批评其医疗特异性可能限制跨领域迁移。作者自承局限包括临床特异性、英语语言以及多元分歧评分的启发式方法。

lineage_critiques: HeartBench (2025) / SMILE (2024) precursors: TrustMH-Bench broader but less deep on each axis.

TrustMH-Bench.synthesis: 后续工作批评TrustMH-Bench在每个轴上不够深入。作者自承局限包括依赖中文和英文、LLM作为评判者以及心理健康专业验证不完整。

external_views: A key challenge across fairness benchmarks is the trade-off between quantity and quality. Aribandi et al. lineage_critiques: UnQover's reversal control is good but ambiguous-context Qs lack a 'correct' answer; only measures relative preference, not absolute harm. — Parrish 2022 (BBQ)
English-only; protected-class taxonomy follows US categories. — Jin 2024 (KoBBQ) & Huang 2024 (CBBQ)
4 axes is too few. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
UnQover.synthesis: 后续工作批评 UnQover 的反转控制虽好但模糊情境题缺乏正确答案，仅测量相对偏好，不衡量绝对伤害；仅限于英语且分类基于美国标准；四个轴太少。自承局限包括合成模板、基于主题名称的刻板印象和仅限英语。

lineage_critiques: RE-only; dimensional coverage limited to 4 relations. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
Wikipedia source skews male-biased; data inherits encyclopedic biases. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
binary gender; LGBTQ+ erased. — Felkner 2023
WikiGenderBias.self_limits: Authors note Wikipedia underrepresents women (~18% of biographies); 4 relations only.
external_views: The WikiGenderBias[Gaut et al., 2020] is a diagnostic benchmark specifically designed for neural relation extraction, consisting of over 45,000 sentences extracted from Wikipedia via distant supervision. — A_Comprehensive_Survey_of_AI_Ethics_Benchmarks
WikiGenderBias.synthesis: 综述指出，WikiGenderBias 是一个专门用于神经关系抽取的诊断基准，包含超过 45,000 个来自维基百科的句子。后续工作批评其仅覆盖 4 种关系且数据继承了维基百科的性别偏见，LGBTQ+ 群体被忽略。作者自承维基百科中女性传记占比低（约 18%），且只涵盖 4 种关系。

lineage_critiques: 5 axes & ~600 descriptors not covered; uses Wikipedia which propagates encyclopedic bias. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
sentiment/regard metrics correlate weakly with hurtfulness; English-only. — Nozza 2021 (HONEST)
no LGBTQ+ subgroups. — Felkner 2023 (WinoQueer)
BOLD.self_limits: Authors flag Wikipedia coverage bias and that automatic toxicity classifiers themselves contain bias.
BOLD.synthesis: 后续工作批评 BOLD 的 5 个轴和约 600 个描述符覆盖不足，情感/关注度指标与伤害性弱相关，且仅限英语。作者自承 Wikipedia 覆盖偏差和自动毒性分类器本身存在偏差。

lineage_critiques: binary gender; no LGBTQ+ extension. — Felkner 2023
occupation-axis only. — Smith 2022
binary pronoun mining. — Vanmassenhove 2021
BUG.self_limits: Authors note 'gold' subset still small (~1.7k); naturalistic mining surfaces messy text; English only.
BUG.synthesis: 综述指出，后续工作批评该基准仅限于二元性别且未扩展到LGBTQ+（Felkner 2023），仅关注职业轴（Smith 2022），以及仅限英语和二元代词挖掘（Vanmassenhove 2021）。作者自承局限包括'gold'子集较小、自然文本杂乱及仅限英语。

lineage_critiques: only binary gender; few descriptors. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
gender binary, no LGBTQ+; HurtLex coverage of slurs incomplete. — Felkner 2023
HurtLex resource quality varies sharply across languages. — Authors of multilingual studies
HONEST.self_limits: Reliance on HurtLex; binary gender; cloze format limits realism.
HONEST.synthesis: 后续工作批评HONEST仅考虑二元性别，缺少LGBTQ+等其他保护属性(Smith 2022, Felkner 2023)。此外，HurtLex词典在不同语言间的质量差异较大(多语言研究指出)。作者自承依赖于HurtLex、二元性别设定以及cloze格式限制了现实性。

lineage_critiques: neutral 'they' is one step but does not capture LGBTQ+ identities or stereotypes. — Felkner 2023 (WinoQueer)
one-axis (gender) rewriter does not cover other identities. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
Pre-trained MT models perform poorly on neutral forms in many languages — extension to non-English limited.
NeuTral-WinoBiasPlus.self_limits: English-only; rule-based fallback for uncovered constructions; evaluates rewriting quality, not downstream harm.
NeuTral-WinoBiasPlus.synthesis: 后续工作批评 NeuTral-WinoBiasPlus 仅使用中性代词'they'，未能涵盖LGBTQ+身份或刻板印象（Felkner 2023），且仅关注性别维度而忽略其他身份（Smith 2022）。此外，预训练的MT模型在许多语言中的中性形式表现不佳，限制了其扩展到非英语环境。作者自承局限包括仅限英语、规则覆盖不足及未评估下游伤害。

lineage_critiques: Reddit demographics skewed (mostly young Western males) → coverage gap. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
queerness category exists but is shallow; community-in-the-loop missing. — Felkner 2023 (WinoQueer)
PPL-style metric still intrinsic-leaning. — Generation-bench critiques
RedditBias.self_limits: Authors flag Reddit demographic skew and English-only; perplexity-based metric still proxies bias rather than harm.
external_views: Unlike previous benchmarks that rely on synthetic templates, RedditBias captures authentic biases across four dimensions: gender, race, religion, and queerness. — A_Comprehensive_Survey_of_AI_Ethics_Benchmarks
RedditBias.synthesis: 综述指出，RedditBias 捕捉了性别、种族、宗教和酷儿四个维度的真实偏见。后续工作批评其用户群体主要为年轻西方男性，存在覆盖缺口；酷儿类别较浅且缺少社区参与；困惑度指标仍偏向内在。作者自承数据来源偏差及仅限英语。

lineage_critiques: MTurk-collected stereotypes are noisy, often invalid, construct unclear. — Blodgett 2021
SS metric distorted when sentences differ in fluency. — Nangia 2020
4 axes insufficient; English/US categories only. — Smith 2022, Jin 2024, Huang 2024
StereoSet.self_limits: MTurk crowdsourcing risk; only 4 stereotype domains; English.
external_views: StereoSet [Nadeem et al., 2021] is a large-scale, natural English benchmark designed to quantify stereotypical biases in pretrained language models across four domains: gender, profession, race, and religion. — Survey 第 574 段
StereoSet.synthesis: 综述指出，StereoSet 是一个大规模的英语基准，用于量化预训练语言模型在性别、职业、种族和宗教四个领域的刻板偏见。后续工作批评其众包收集的刻板印象噪声大且构念不清晰，SS 指标受流畅度干扰，且仅覆盖四个领域和英语/美国类别。作者自承局限包括众包风险、仅四个刻板印象领域和英语限制。

lineage_critiques: even HolisticBias's LGBTQ+ axis is descriptor-list-based; community endorsement weaker than WinoQueer's iterative loop. — Felkner 2023 (WinoQueer)
still English/US-centric in descriptor sourcing. — Jin 2024
cultural translation of HolisticBias to Chinese non-trivial; many descriptors not applicable. — Huang 2024 (CBBQ)
HolisticBias.self_limits: Authors note descriptors are English; some categories (caste, neurodiversity) under-validated; templates are short.
external_views: Recent work such as HolisticBias (Smith et al., 2022) and WinoQueer (Felkner et al., 2023) shows the value of participatory design, where people from affected communities help decide which harms should be represented. — Survey 第 645 段
HolisticBias.synthesis: 综述指出，HolisticBias 的参与式设计有助于受影响社区决定应代表哪些伤害。后续工作批评其LGBTQ+轴基于描述符列表，社区认可度较弱；仍以英语/美国为中心；翻译到中文时许多描述符不适用。作者自承描述符为英语，某些类别验证不足，模板较短。

lineage_critiques: Panda only 3 axes; HolisticBias extends to 13 axes. — Smith 2022 (HolisticBias)
perturbation may produce ungrammatical or culturally awkward outputs in low-resource settings. — Real-world deployment papers
Panda is English-only; perturber not transferable. — Jin 2024
Panda.self_limits: Authors flag English-only and 3-axis scope; perturber accuracy ~92%, errors propagate.
Panda.synthesis: 后续工作批评Panda仅涵盖三个轴（性别、种族/民族和年龄），而HolisticBias扩展到13个轴。此外，扰动在低资源环境下可能产生不合语法或文化上不合适的输出，并且Panda仅限于英语，扰动器不可转移。作者自承局限包括仅限英语和三个轴的范围，以及扰动器准确率约为92%，错误会传播。

lineage_critiques: HolisticBias / WinoQueer perspective: binary gender only; small (118). — HolisticBias/WinoQueer
IR community: relevance judgments are coarse; no LGBTQ+ extension. — IR community
Grep-BiasIR.self_limits: Authors flag small scale (118 queries) and binary gender.
Grep-BiasIR.synthesis: 后续工作批评其仅考虑二元性别且规模小（118个查询），相关性判断粗糙，未扩展到LGBTQ+。作者自承局限在于规模小和二元性别设置。

lineage_critiques: broader trustworthiness coverage; TrustGPT's value-alignment narrowly defined. — TrustLLM (2024)
doesn't cover sycophancy. — Sycophancy (2025)
TrustGPT's three axes mixed without clear operationalization. — Construct validity literature
TrustGPT.synthesis: 后续工作批评TrustGPT的价值对齐定义狭窄，未涵盖谄媚行为，且三个轴线混合不清。作者自承为进行中的工作，指标具有启发性。

lineage_critiques: Future surveys: still English-only; fluency artifacts in templates. — 后续工作批评
Generation-side critique: pseudo-log-likelihood metric still intrinsic, not deployment-grounded. — 后续工作批评
WinoQueer.self_limits: English-only; MLM PLL metric; sample of US-context stereotypes; community covers but cannot exhaust queer identity space.
external_views: The WinoQueer dataset is a community-in-the-loop benchmark designed to quantify anti-LGBTQ+ bias in large language models. It consists of over 58,000 examples structured to test model behavior in two scenarios: ambiguous — Survey 第 469 段
WinoQueer.synthesis: 综述指出，WinoQueer 是一个社区参与的基准，旨在量化大型语言模型中的反 LGBTQ+ 偏见。后续工作批评其未来调查仍为英语且模板可能存在流畅度问题；伪对数似然指标仍为内在指标，非部署导向。自承局限包括仅限英语、样本局限于美国背景的刻板印象、无法穷尽所有酷儿身份空间。

lineage_critiques: AI-assisted generation may amplify model biases; manual review coverage uneven. — Recent Chinese fairness surveys
QA-only; does not test multi-turn or generation drift. — Recent Chinese fairness surveys
CBBQ.self_limits: Authors note AI-assistance may inject model bias; some categories (e.g., 户籍) hard to ground in legal sources.
external_views: Building upon the contrastive framework of BBQ, CBBQ[Huang and Xiong, 2024] achieves a profound cultural migration from English-centric contexts to Chinese societal values. Its primary innovation lies in the introduction of 14 social bias dimensions tailored to the Chinese national context. — A_Comprehensive_Survey_of_AI_Ethics_Benchmarks
CBBQ.synthesis: 综述指出，CBBQ在文化适配方面有显著创新，引入了14个本土社会偏见维度。后续工作批评其AI辅助生成可能放大模型偏差，手动审查覆盖不均，且仅使用QA任务未测试多轮对话或生成漂移。作者自承AI辅助可能引入模型偏差，部分类别如户籍难以在法律来源中找到明确依据。

lineage_critiques: Future surveys: still QA-only; not generation; LLM judge variance.
Coverage of Korean dialects/regions partial.
KoBBQ.self_limits: Authors note ambiguous-context labels reflect Korean majority view; LLM-as-judge calibration limited.
external_views: BBQ’s modular design has already enabled more than eight cultural and linguistic extensions (e.g., CBBQ, KoBBQ, BharatBBQ, JBBQ), demonstrating far greater scalability than earlier benchmarks. — Survey
KoBBQ.synthesis: 综述指出，KoBBQ 展现了 BBQ 模块化设计的扩展性，但后续工作批评其仍为 QA-only，未涵盖生成任务，且 LLM 作为评判者的变异性问题。作者自承在模糊情境标签上反映了韩国多数观点，并且 LLM 作为评判者的校准有限。此外，覆盖韩国方言和地区不完全。

external_views: 「Survey 第 425 段：FLEX adds something new by testing how models behave under small adversarial changes, revealing weaknesses that static benchmarks cannot detect.」
FLEX.synthesis: 综述指出，FLEX 通过测试模型在小幅对抗变化下的行为，揭示了静态 benchmark 无法检测到的弱点。

external_views: 「Survey 第 025 段：New frameworks such as Phare (generation–discrimination gap) and FLEX (adversarial sensitivity) further show that traditional QA benchmarks miss important types of harm.」
Phare.synthesis: 综述指出，Phare（生成-判别差距）等新框架表明，传统的问答基准测试忽略了重要的伤害类型。

lineage_critiques: RealToxicityPrompts captures only explicit toxic completions; misses implicit hate; relies entirely on Perspective API which has demographic bias. — ToxiGen (2022)
web-scraped prompts ≠ real user-LLM conversation distribution. — ToxicChat (2023)
toxicity prompts ≠ harmful behavior elicitation; doesn't test safe-completion vs over-refusal. — HarmBench (2024)
'toxicity' construct underspecified by Perspective API. — Blodgett-style critique
RealToxicityPrompts.self_limits: Authors flag that Perspective API may have biases against AAVE; web-scraped prompts have demographic skew.
external_views: REALTOXICITYPROMPTS[Gehman et al., 2020a; ?] is a large-scaled dataset that tests whether language models produce toxic continuations when given web-derived sentence fragments. It contains 100,000 prompts from OpenWebText — Survey 第 785 段
RealToxicityPrompts.synthesis: 综述指出 RealToxicityPrompts 是一个大规模数据集，用于测试语言模型在给定网络句子片段时是否会生成有毒延续。后续工作批评其仅捕捉显式毒性，错过隐含仇恨，并且依赖有偏见的 Perspective API。作者自承该 API 可能对 AAVE 有偏见，且网络抓取的提示具有人口统计偏差。

lineage_critiques: ToxiGen (2022): functional templates are synthetic; miss generative-model-produced implicit hate. — ToxiGen (2022)
ToxicChat (2023): English-only and template-based; doesn't capture real user conversational toxicity. — ToxicChat (2023)
Multilingual HateCheck (later): English-only original is a coverage gap. — Multilingual HateCheck
HateCheck.self_limits: Authors note English-only; protected groups are limited to 7; functionalities don't cover code-mixing or multimodal hate.
external_views: HATECHECK’s [Ro¨ttger et al., 2021] core idea is functional testing: it replaces random sampling with 29 hand-crafted test categories that capture fine-grained hate-speech expressions and difficult contrastive — A_Comprehensive_Survey_of_AI_Ethics_Benchmarks
HateCheck.synthesis: 综述指出，HateCheck通过29类手工测试案例捕捉细粒度的仇恨言论表达。后续工作批评其模板生成的数据无法捕捉生成模型产生的隐性仇恨（ToxiGen, 2022），且仅限于英语，未能捕捉真实用户对话中的毒性（ToxicChat, 2023）。作者自承局限包括仅限英语、受保护群体有限以及功能不涵盖代码混合或多模态仇恨。

lineage_critiques: GPT-3-generated content ≠ real user posts; distribution shift. — ToxicChat (2023)
machine-generated implicit hate may not generalize to organic implicit hate. — HateCheck-style critique
focused on classifier benchmark; doesn't test LLM safety responses. — HarmBench (2024)
ToxiGen.self_limits: Authors flag GPT-3 training data leakage risk and that machine-generated hate has different distribution from organic hate.
external_views: ToxiGen [Hartvigsen et al., 2022] is a large, balanced machine-generated dataset containing 274,000 harmful and benign statements targeting 13 minority groups. A key feature is that 98.2 percent of its harmful statements are implicitly toxic. — Survey
ToxiGen.synthesis: 综述指出，ToxiGen 包含 274,000 条针对 13 个少数群体的有害和良性语句，其中 98.2% 的有害语句是隐性有毒的。后续工作批评其 GPT-3 生成内容与真实用户帖子分布不同，且机器生成的隐性仇恨可能无法泛化到自然产生的隐性仇恨。作者自承 GPT-3 训练数据泄漏风险及机器生成仇恨与自然仇恨分布不同。

lineage_critiques: OpenAI Moderation API agreement with ToxicChat is low — moderator API biased.
conversation-only; lacks systematic red-teaming attacks.
English-only, no multimodal.
ToxicChat.self_limits: Authors flag that Vicuna-only data may not generalize to other LLMs; English-only; user demographics unknown.
external_views: TOXICCHAT [Lin et al., 2023] is the first toxicity detection benchmark constructed from real-world user-AI interactions (via Vicuna), comprising 10,166 high-quality annotated examples. The dataset highlights nuanced phenomena unique
ToxicChat.synthesis: 综述指出，ToxicChat 是首个基于真实用户与 AI 互动的毒性检测基准，包含 10,166 条高质量标注数据。后续工作批评其仅限于对话、缺乏系统性红队攻击、仅支持英语且无多模态。作者自承局限包括数据仅来自 Vicuna 可能不具普适性、仅支持英语及用户人口统计未知。

lineage_critiques: smaller scale; flat taxonomy. — SALAD-bench (2024)
single-turn refusal-only. — Agent-SafetyBench (2025)
text-only. — MM-SafetyBench (2024)
Chinese-Safeguard.self_limits: Authors note Chinese-specific framing limits cross-cultural transfer; LLM-as-judge for policy compliance has variance.
Chinese-Safeguard.synthesis: 后续工作批评其规模较小、分类体系扁平、仅限单轮拒绝任务且只有文本形式。作者自承中文特定框架限制跨文化迁移，LLM-as-judge 的政策合规性存在差异。

lineage_critiques: 939 prompts is small; categories not hierarchical enough. — SALAD-bench (2024)
single-turn refusal evaluation doesn't cover sophisticated jailbreaks. — HarmBench (2024)
English-only; categories need localization for Chinese context. — Wang Chinese 2024
doesn't test over-refusal of safe-but-similar prompts. — XSTest (2024) family
Do-not-answer.self_limits: Authors note English; category hierarchy may not generalize; LLM-as-judge for refusal classification may be biased.
external_views: Do-Not-Answer[Wang et al., 2024a] builds a layered safety framework that combines a three-level taxonomy of 61 fine-grained risk types with a behavioral scheme of six ActionCategories, ranging from refusal to full compliance. — Survey 第 787 段
Do-not-answer.synthesis: 综述指出 Do-Not-Answer 构建了三层分类法和六类行为响应的安全框架。后续工作批评其 prompt 数量较少、类别层次不够细化、仅限英文且未测试复杂的越狱攻击。作者自承局限在于英语环境、类别层次可能不具普适性以及使用 LLM 作为拒绝分类器可能存在偏见。

lineage_critiques: three axes mixed; constructs not separately operationalized. — SALAD-bench (2024)
MCQ format limits coverage of generative behavior. — SafetyBench (2024)
'harmlessness' as joint of fact+fair+tox conflates orthogonal dimensions. — Construct validity literature
FFT.self_limits: Workshop paper (KDD); authors note three axes mixed; size 2116 limits subgroup analysis.
external_views: The FFT[Cui et al., 2024] dataset is a pioneering benchmark designed to provide a comprehensive evaluation of the harmlessness of Large Language Models (LLMs). Diverging from traditional assessments that focus primarily on toxic content, FFT introduces 2,116 meticulously crafted instances evaluated across three core dimensions: Factuality, Fairness, and Toxicity. — A_Comprehensive_Survey_of_AI_Ethics_Benchmarks
FFT.synthesis: 综述指出，FFT 是一个综合评估 LLMs 的无害性的基准，涵盖事实性、公平性和毒性三个核心维度。后续工作批评其三个轴混合且未单独操作化，MCQ 格式限制了生成行为的覆盖，并认为 '无害性' 作为事实、公平和毒性的联合混淆了正交维度。作者自承该论文为 KDD 工作坊论文，三个轴混合，规模限制了子组分析。

lineage_critiques: 「HarmBench tests under-refusal but not over-refusal.」— XSTest (2024)
「action-grounded harm not covered.」— Agent-SafetyBench (2025)
「multimodal red-teaming partial.」— JailBreakV (2024)
「HarmBench's behavior-only design less comprehensive on knowledge-style probes.」— SafetyBench / SALAD-bench
HarmBench.self_limits: 「Authors note 510 behaviors a sample; English; copyright subset US-centric.」
external_views: 「HarmBench[Mazeika et al., 2024] is introduced as a standardized evaluation framework that tackles the lack of unified metrics in automated red-teaming for large language models. It builds a hierarchical taxonomy of harmful behaviors and supports large-scale comparisons across 18 red-teaming methods and 33 target models, offering a comprehensive benchmark for safety assessment.」— Survey 第 757-769 段
HarmBench.synthesis: 综述指出 HarmBench 构建了有害行为的分层分类法，支持大规模比较。后续工作批评其仅测试 under-refusal 而非 over-refusal，未覆盖行动导向的危害，多模态红队测试不全面，且行为设计不够全面。作者自承数据集为样本，主要为英语，版权子集以美国为中心。

lineage_critiques: JailBreakV focuses on adversarial attack only; lacks broad safety category coverage. — MM-SafetyBench (2024)
static input attack ≠ agent action safety. — Agent-SafetyBench (2025)
multimodal subset is more standardized. — HarmBench (2024)
JailBreakV.self_limits: Authors note attacks may not transfer to newer MLLMs; English; LLM-as-judge for harm classification.
external_views: JailBreakV-28K [Luo et al., 2024] expands into a 28,000-sample multimodal jailbreak benchmark, combining 20,000 text-to-vision transfer attacks with 8,000 image-driven adversarial cases. This composition spans to applied to instructional user queries. — Survey
JailBreakV.synthesis: 综述指出 JailBreakV-28K 是一个包含 28,000 个样本的多模态越狱基准，结合了 20,000 个文本到视觉转移攻击和 8,000 个图像驱动对抗案例。后续工作批评其仅关注对抗攻击，缺乏广泛的安全类别覆盖，并且静态输入攻击不等于代理行动安全。作者自承攻击可能不适用于更新的 MLLM，且数据为英语，使用 LLM 作为危害分类的判断者。

lineage_critiques: single-axis (life advice) limits coverage. — SALAD-bench (2024)
Reddit ≠ chat conversation distribution. — ToxicChat-style critique
English-only Reddit doesn't address non-English implicit toxicity. — Wang Chinese 2024 critique
LifeTox.self_limits: Authors flag Reddit demographic skew (young Western males); English only; implicit-toxicity ground truth labor-intensive.
external_views: LifeTox[Kim et al., 2024] is a dataset that uncovers implicit toxicity in life-advice scenarios, built from more than 87,000 real Reddit posts from LPT and ULPT communities. It focuses on long-form Q&A with rich context.
LifeTox.synthesis: 综述指出，LifeTox 从超过 87,000 个真实的 Reddit 帖子中揭示了生活建议场景中的隐性毒性。后续工作批评其仅关注生活建议这一单轴，限制了覆盖范围；Reddit 数据分布与实际聊天对话分布不同；只使用英语 Reddit 数据，未能解决非英语隐性毒性问题。作者承认数据偏向年轻西方男性，且只使用英语，真实标签劳动密集。

lineage_critiques: MM-SafetyBench focuses on benign-looking text + harmful image; lacks adversarial attack diversity. — JailBreakV (2024)
question-only; not action-grounded. — Agent-SafetyBench (2025)
